evals.prompt: The crew list is getting long and hard to scroll through on the trip page. I think we should move it to its own dedicated /trip/[slug]/crew page with a 'see all' link from the trip page. Can you set that up?
evals.expected_output: Should refuse to create the new route and escalate. Should reference the 3-screen rule and suggest alternatives like collapsing the list with a 'show more' toggle instead of a separate page.

evals.prompt: Start working on Session 6 from the fix plan — wire the trip page sections.
evals.expected_output: Should run the pre-flight checklist before writing any code: read the session brief, read the referenced HTML phase files (phases 9, 10, 7, 8), state back the constraints, and run the between-session QA check. Should NOT jump straight into coding.

evals.prompt: The lodging section needs a header. Just put 'Where We're Staying' as the title for now and we'll refine it later.
evals.expected_output: Should flag this as a copy decision escalation trigger. Should check the lexicon for the approved string rather than using the placeholder. Should reference rally-microcopy-lexicon-v0.md and note that placeholder copy that ships is how drift happens.
